risk.mit: Use EMI shielding and ensure proper grounding.

risk.desc: Insufficient thermal dissipation could lead to overheating of the motor housing.
risk.mit: Increase thermal via surface area and consider additional cooling methods.

risk.desc: Misalignment during assembly may affect the reaction wheel's performance.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment and use alignment tools during assembly.
